title: Small Doubling
description: Allows you to duplicate any Small Flower using Bonemeal, just like the big ones!
body:
Small Doubling

SmallDoubling is a lightweight Minecraft mod for NeoForge that enhances gameplay by allowing players to double small flower drops using bone meal.

Features

  • Right-click small flowers with bone meal to get an extra flower drop.
  • Works only on blocks tagged as small_flowers.
  • Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.1 using NeoForge.
  • Client-friendly: all logic runs server-side to prevent duplication issues.
  • Lightweight and easy to integrate into existing worlds or servers.

How to Use

  1. Hold Bone Meal in your hand.
  2. Right-click on a small flower (e.g., poppy, daisy).
  3. The flower will drop an extra item immediately.
  4. If in Creative mode, bone meal is not consumed.

Installation

  • Download the mod jar from Modrinth.
  • Place the jar file into your mods folder.
  • Launch Minecraft with the NeoForge mod loader.
